_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology
_publications._fundingAgency: NTAP; NCI; Department of Defense CDMRP
_publications._context: MN-2 PDX established from primary maxillary sinus NF1-MPNST; assembled into 3D microtissues with robust viability (>90% at 48 h); used for ex vivo drug response testing (trabectedin, olaparib, mirdametinib)

_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors
_publications._context: eight PDXs [JH-2-002, JH-2-031, JH-2-079c, WU-225, WU-386, WU-545, MN-2, and MN-3-002] were generated in our laboratories

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated MPNST patient-derived xenograft established at University of Minnesota; primary maxillary sinus tumor; assembled into 3D microtissues with robust viability and used for ex vivo drug response testing in PMID:37246765
basicInfo.clinicalData: Sex: Female; Age group at MPNST: >40 years; NF1 status: NF1; MPNST grade: High; MPNST location: maxillary sinus; MPNST type: primary; MPNST size: <10 cm; clinical status: unknown
